mapper.sql: id, user_id, symbol, sort_order, note, price_upper, price_lower, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_favorite (user_id, symbol, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{symbol}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND symbol = #{symbol}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT symbol FROM user_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
